name: Poppy Seed Cake with Orange Glaze (Tdn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, corn oil, eggs, vanilla, and almond extracts. Beat to blend.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, poppy seeds, baking powder, and salt.
5. Add the dry ingredients alternately with milk into the bowl containing the sugar mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Mix until well blended.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for approximately 45 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Remove the cake from the oven and place it on a wire rack to cool for 10 minutes.
9. Prepare the glaze by whisking powdered sugar, orange juice, and almond extract together in a small bowl until smooth.
10. Turn the cake onto a serving plate or rack. Drizzle the glaze over the warm cake and allow it to cool completely before slicing.
Note: This poppy seed cake works well at both low and high altitudes and can be stored covered on the countertop for several days, as well as frozen unglazed. It can be served plain for snacking, glazed for dessert, or with orange slices for breakfast.
